response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, including embedded systems and C/C++ (e.g., National Instruments, robotic arms), but lacks direct experience with Linux kernel modification, MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or embedded networking environments critical for this role. Native-level Japanese proficiency is not evident, and the resume does not highlight networking-specific projects or switch-chip knowledge.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience with embedded systems (National Instruments, robotic arms).
Proven track record in full-stack development and system architecture (re:cinq, Optilyz).
Open-source contributions and leadership in technical workshops (Altom, GISCollective).
concerns: No explicit experience with Linux kernel modification or MACsec/IEEE 802.1X security protocols.
Lacks native-level Japanese proficiency (job requires this).
Limited exposure to embedded networking (LAN-switch products) or chip-vendor SDKs.
